description: Pre-defined business metrics for the sales data model initialization

metrics.description: Sum of all net revenue (after discounts) from completed sales transactions.
metrics.notes: This is the primary revenue metric. It excludes cancelled and pending orders.

metrics.description: Total profit calculated as net revenue minus total cost of goods sold.
metrics.notes: Key profitability indicator. Shows actual margin after costs and discounts.

metrics.description: Average revenue per transaction using safe division to avoid errors.
metrics.notes: Uses safe_divide UDF to handle edge cases. Excludes cancelled orders.

metrics.description: Total number of product units sold across all transactions.
metrics.notes: Useful for inventory planning and volume analysis.

metrics.description: Average profit margin percentage using safe calculation to prevent division by zero.
metrics.notes: Uses safe_percentage UDF. Shows overall business profitability health.

metrics.description: Total number of unique sales transactions.
metrics.notes: Useful for understanding sales velocity and customer purchase frequency.

usage_notes.loading: These metrics can be loaded into the system using the create_metric Tauri command
usage_notes.filtering: All metrics can be filtered using the optional filters parameter when executing
usage_notes.dimensions: Combine these metrics with dimensions from dim_customers, dim_products, or dim_time for detailed analysis
usage_notes.relationships: The system will automatically build JOIN paths between fact_sales and dimension tables
